variants.title: Donaldson K070248 Hydraulic Filter Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson K070248 Hydraulic Filter Assembly offers a complete solution for hydraulic filtration, integrating high-performance filters with durable housings for optimal system protection. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, supporting efficient operation and reducing wear on critical components. Designed for versatility and ease of use, this assembly accommodates various filter types and sizes. Its robust construction makes it suitable for a wide range of hydraulic applications, from industrial machinery to mobile equipment.
specifications: Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.5 BAR
